description: IQ Candles is the primary signal. RSI and Bollinger Bands are used as confirmation filters. Never fight a strong IQ Candles signal.

iq_candles.description: IQ Candles colours each candle to show bullish or bearish momentum. A bullish candle (typically green/blue) signals buying pressure. A bearish candle (typically red/orange) signals selling pressure.

signals.bullish: Candle colour flips to bullish after 1+ bearish candles — momentum shift up
signals.bearish: Candle colour flips to bearish after 1+ bullish candles — momentum shift down
signals.strong_bullish: 3+ consecutive bullish candles — strong uptrend, hold or add
signals.strong_bearish: 3+ consecutive bearish candles — strong downtrend, stay out or exit

signals.buy_zone: RSI below 60 — room to run upward, confirms buy
signals.sell_zone: RSI above 60 — stretched, confirms sell or stay out
signals.oversold_bounce: RSI crosses back above 30 — potential reversal up
signals.overbought_reversal: RSI crosses back below 70 — potential reversal down
signals.caution: RSI above 70 — do NOT buy even if IQ Candles is bullish

bollinger_bands.role: CONTEXT — shows where price is relative to fair value

signals.lower_band_touch: Price at or below lower band — oversold zone, strong buy area if IQ Candles confirms
signals.upper_band_touch: Price at or above upper band — overbought zone, strong sell area if IQ Candles confirms
signals.middle_band_cross_up: Price crosses above middle band (20 EMA) — bullish momentum building
signals.middle_band_cross_down: Price crosses below middle band — bearish momentum building
signals.band_squeeze: Bands narrowing — low volatility, big move coming, wait for IQ Candles direction
signals.band_expansion: Bands widening — trend is accelerating, ride it with IQ Candles

required: IQ Candles shows bullish candle or bullish flip (MANDATORY — no buy without this)
strong_buy: Price at or near lower Bollinger Band OR just crossed above middle band
avoid_buy_if: Price already at or above upper Bollinger Band
IQ Candles is bearish — do not buy against the candle colour
3+ consecutive bearish IQ Candles — downtrend, stay out

required: IQ Candles shows bearish candle or bearish flip (MANDATORY — no sell signal without this)
strong_sell: RSI above 60 or crossing down from above 70
Price at or near upper Bollinger Band OR just crossed below middle band
avoid_sell_if: Price at lower Bollinger Band — likely to bounce
IQ Candles still bullish — do not sell into a bullish candle

trailing_stop_loss.description: Protects profits once trade is 5% in the green. Once activated, the stop trails to ensure you never go back to red.
rules: Do nothing until position reaches +5% profit — stop loss is not active before this
Once +5% is hit, immediately move stop loss to breakeven (your entry price) — you cannot lose money from this point
From +5% onward, trail the stop 3% below the highest price reached
Example: entry $100, high reaches $110 (+10%), stop trails to $106.70 (3% below $110)
If price pulls back and hits the trailing stop — exit. You still profit.
If price keeps running — let it run. The stop keeps trailing up automatically.
Never manually lower the trailing stop once activated

position_sizing.advice: Never risk more than you are comfortable losing before the trailing stop activates (i.e. the first 5% move against you). Size your position so a 5% loss is acceptable.

signal_scoring.description: Score each potential trade 0-10. Only take trades scoring 6 or above.

daily_brief_template.description: What Claude should tell you each morning (or on demand)
format: IQ Candles status: bullish / bearish / transitioning
RSI reading and zone (oversold / neutral / overbought)
Bollinger Band position (at lower / middle / upper / squeezing)
Recommendation: STRONG BUY / BUY / WAIT / SELL / STRONG SELL
Trailing stop status (if in a trade)
